title: The Way That Lovers Use
content:
The way that lovers use is this;
    They bow, catch hands, with never a word,
    And their lips meet, and they do kiss,
        So I have heard.

    They queerly find some healing so,
    And strange attainment in the touch;
    There is a secret lovers know,
        I have read as much.

    And theirs no longer joy nor smart,
    Changing or ending, night or day;
    But mouth to mouth, and heart on heart,
        So lovers say.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Rupert Brooke delivers a powerful performance in "The Way That Lovers Use"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
